creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
I understand that it's just the way that upstream packages it.

But this thing draws in all kind of dependencies like cacti when all I want is the nagios-checks.

It would be nice if the cacti and nagios-parts could be split up.


Also, the nagios-checks assume that the "mysql" binary is in the path, which it isn't by default when the checks are run from NRPE.
